hypothesis: Prospectively ledgered hypotheses will be easier to update, falsify, and safely reuse than free-form frontier research notes.
generation_context: Frontier scan covering scientific AI, longitudinal health agents, virtual-cell benchmarks, veterinary benchmark infrastructure, and moving-literature hypothesis generation.
prediction_target: Curator reconstruction accuracy and stale-claim detection for future discovery-memory updates.

prospective_validation_window.rationale: The gate should be judged only against evidence and curator actions that occur after the source cutoff.

boundary_conditions.species: human, animal, and cross-species only as labeled evidence domains
boundary_conditions.modality: literature, benchmark, dataset, and synthetic packet metadata
boundary_conditions.site_or_cohort: public sources and synthetic fixtures only
blocked_inferences: does not claim any cure or diagnosis
does not translate human clinical evidence into veterinary advice
does not treat benchmark success as biological mechanism proof

missingness: No real patient or animal records are included.
No prospective curator comparison has been run yet.
Source scan may miss paywalled or unpublished institutional work.
revision_reason: Prior gates labeled evidence boundaries but did not force each hypothesis to carry a future evidence ledger.
falsification_route: Compare later update quality for ledgered packets versus ungated notes; remove or revise if there is no measurable improvement.
next_executable_action: Run the validator regression test for this gate.
